# Aditya Kumar - Full-Stack Web Developer & System Engineer

> High-performance web applications, scalable backend architecture, and secure digital experiences.

## Developer Identity
- **Name**: Aditya Kumar
- **Role**: Full-Stack Web Developer / System Engineer
- **Location**: Barabanki / Lucknow, India
- **Email**: mradityaji2@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://eraditya.dev
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/eraditya1
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ErAditya1

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, ShadcnUI, AceternityUI.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, Socket.io, Django (Python).
- **Database**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, Redis.
- **Tools**: Git/GitHub, Docker, WebSockets, BullMQ, Prisma ORM, Redux/Context API, Cloudinary, Razorpay Integration.

## Key Projects

### Billionaire Vox (Influencer Collaboration & Campaign Management)
- **Problem**: Fragmented influencer marketing workflows and lack of transparent escrow systems.
- **Solution**: A scalable platform with real-time workflows, automated verification, and secure escrow payouts.
- **Architecture**: NestJS backend with event-driven architecture (BullMQ + Redis), PostgreSQL/Prisma for data integrity, and real-time WebSocket updates.

### Super Tasky (Productivity)
- **Problem**: Inefficient team collaboration and deadline tracking.
- **Solution**: A real-time task management platform with project tracking and reminders.
- **Architecture**: Next.js + Socket.io for real-time sync, MongoDB for flexible data storage.

### BrightVeil (LMS)
- **Problem**: Fragmented learning experiences and slow media delivery.
- **Solution**: A scalable LMS with video courses, instructor dashboards, and learner analytics.
- **Architecture**: Next.js, optimized media delivery via Cloudinary, secure payments with Razorpay.

### MintSlot (Resource Booking)
- **Problem**: Manual slot management for industrial resources (mentha distillation).
- **Solution**: Real-time resource booking platform with availability management.
- **Architecture**: Next.js + Firebase for real-time state management.

## Capabilities
- **Full-Stack Development**: End-to-end web applications using modern frameworks.
- **System Design**: Designing scalable and maintainable backend architectures.
- **Real-time Systems**: Implementing WebSockets for instant data synchronization.
- **UI/UX Excellence**: Creating premium, cinematic user interfaces with smooth animations.
